'''Hontho''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] henchman of [[8t88/Legends|8t88]], along with [[Trox (bodyguard)|Trox]] and [[Rol (Human)|Rol]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. 

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] they served [[8t88/Legends|8t88]], a dignitary on a personal mission for [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], and they were with him in the [[Government House (Sulon)|Government House]] in [[Barons Hed]]. They coped with the demented [[droid/Legends|droid]]'s various eccentricities.<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

Grontho was present when [[Unidentified_majordomo_(Jerec)|Jerec's majordomo]] attempted to explain why the droid was assigned to a humble room; when the droid asked him to approach to listen him better, Hontho exchanged looks with Rol, knowing that his [[amplifier]]s could hear the slightest sound from a distance. Shuffling forward, he was grabbed by the droid and [[urine/Legends|urinated]], causing the human guards to wrinkle their noses, except Hontho, who didn't notice.<ref name="RA" />

He was killed when Katarn was infiltrating [[Government House (Sulon)|Government House]] to capture 8t88 for information on the [[Valley of the Jedi]].
